## Scope check

This tool is intentionally narrow: stdlib-only, whitespace-token lexical metrics, batch scoring.

- [ ] This feature does not add a runtime dependency, OR a runtime dep is strictly necessary and I've noted why
- [ ] This feature does not add semantic / embedding logic (that belongs in a companion package)
- [ ] This feature does not break the existing output schema, OR I've marked it as a major-version change
